steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$-12x + 14y = 36$$ and $$-6x + 7y = -18$$. This gives $\frac{-12}{-6}=\frac{14}{7}=2$ but $\frac{36}{-18}=-2$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: The $x$,$y$ ratios match but the constant ratio differs — the lines are parallel and never meet, so zero solutions. That matches choice D — D is correct.
